headline: A Look At Generac Holdings (GNRC) Valuation After Powerful Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Generac Holdings is on investors’ radar Generac Holdings (GNRC) has been drawing fresh attention as investors look at its recent share performance alongside the company’s scale, with a market value of about US$15.7b and annual revenue of roughly US$4.3b. See our latest analysis for Generac Holdings. At a share price of US$266.75, Generac’s short term momentum has been strong, with a 30 day share price return of 39.6% and year to date share price return of 89.1%. The 1 year total...
